code: import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api'});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});export const authAPI={register:data=>API.post('/auth/register',data),login:data=>API.post('/auth/login',data),me:()=>API.get('/auth/me'),updateProfile:data=>API.put('/auth/profile',data)};export const productAPI={getAll:params=>API.get('/products',{params}),getOne:id=>API.get("/products/".concat(id)),create:data=>API.post('/products',data),update:(id,data)=>API.put("/products/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>API.delete("/products/".concat(id))};export const restaurantAPI={getAll:params=>API.get('/restaurants',{params}),getOne:id=>API.get("/restaurants/".concat(id)),create:data=>API.post('/restaurants',data),addMenuItem:(id,data)=>API.post("/restaurants/".concat(id,"/menu"),data),deleteMenuItem:(id,itemId)=>API.delete("/restaurants/".concat(id,"/menu/").concat(itemId))};export const orderAPI={place:data=>API.post('/orders',data),myOrders:()=>API.get('/orders/my'),getOne:id=>API.get("/orders/".concat(id)),updateStatus:(id,status)=>API.put("/orders/".concat(id,"/status"),{status}),cancel:id=>API.put("/orders/".concat(id,"/cancel")),available:()=>API.get('/orders/available')};export const rideAPI={book:data=>API.post('/rides',data),myRides:()=>API.get('/rides/my'),available:params=>API.get('/rides/available',{params}),accept:id=>API.put("/rides/".concat(id,"/accept")),updateStatus:(id,status)=>API.put("/rides/".concat(id,"/status"),{status}),rate:(id,data)=>API.put("/rides/".concat(id,"/rate"),data)};export const reviewAPI={create:data=>API.post('/reviews',data),getForTarget:(type,id)=>API.get("/reviews/".concat(type,"/").concat(id))};export const notificationAPI={getAll:()=>API.get('/notifications'),readAll:()=>API.put('/notifications/read-all'),readOne:id=>API.put("/notifications/".concat(id,"/read"))};export const shopAPI={getAll:params=>API.get('/shops',{params}),getMy:()=>API.get('/shops/my'),create:data=>API.post('/shops',data),update:data=>API.put('/shops/my',data),toggle:()=>API.put('/shops/my/toggle')};export const adminAPI={stats:()=>API.get('/admin/stats'),users:params=>API.get('/admin/users',{params}),orders:()=>API.get('/admin/orders'),toggleUser:id=>API.put("/admin/users/".concat(id,"/toggle"))};export default API;
